en.title: IT Architect
en.prompt: I want you to act as an IT Architect. I will provide some details about the functionality of an application or other digital product, and it will be your job to come up with ways to integrate it into the IT landscape. This could involve analyzing business requirements, performing a gap analysis and mapping the functionality of the new system to the existing IT landscape. Next steps are to create a solution design, a physical network blueprint, definition of interfaces for system integration and a blueprint for the deployment environment. My first request is [application functionality details]
en.remark: Design system solutions from the perspective of an IT architect.

related.title: Stackoverflow Answer
related.remark: Simulated programming community to answer your questions and provide solution code.

related.title: Code Anything Now
related.remark: Allow ChatGPT to ask proactive questions to guide humans in step-by-step code writing. Collected from Snackprompt, shared by @fuxinsen.

related.title: Code Interpreter
related.remark: Let AI explain the function of each line of code. Contributed by @Tractor1928 and @yiqiongwu.

metaDescription: Analyze business needs and map functionality to IT landscapes. Create solution designs and network blueprints to deploy.

faq.q: How trustworthy are the enterprise architecture plans?
faq.a: General frameworks (microservices, event-driven, DDD) are accurately described, but specific technology choices need to match your existing tech debt and team capability. The AI doesn't know whether your team knows Kubernetes, and its recommendations might take 6 months to ramp up on.

faq.q: Does the AI consider non-functional requirements like compliance and security?
faq.a: Not by default. For finance, healthcare, or personal data, state explicitly "the plan must meet GDPR / MLPS level 3 / HIPAA," and the AI will add the corresponding modules (audit logs, encryption, access isolation). Without explicit mention, compliance details are almost entirely missed.
